VAL-APP-001.evidence: curl http://localhost:8585/ returns HTTP 200 in 1.6ms. Server is running on port 8585.
VAL-APP-001.details: curl -sf -o /dev/null -w 'HTTP_CODE:%{http_code}' http://localhost:8585/ returned HTTP_CODE:200. Page served full HTML content.

VAL-APP-002.evidence: Main page loads with all assets. style.css (200), app.js (200) served from /static/. Screenshot shows styled page with navigation, search bar, and mode toggle. No 404s in resource loading.
VAL-APP-002.details: All 3 static files (index.html, style.css, app.js) return HTTP 200. Browser performance.getEntriesByType('resource') shows only 2 resources: style.css and app.js, both from localhost:8585 with status 200. No console errors. Screenshot saved as VAL-APP-002-page-loaded.png.

steps.observed: Page loads with nav bar, search UI, all CSS applied

VAL-APP-003.details: curl -sf http://localhost:8585/api/health returned HTTP 200 with JSON body indicating database is accessible.

steps.expected: 200 with JSON status and DB accessible indicator

VAL-APP-004.evidence: GET /api/facts/999999 returns 404 with JSON: {"error":"Fact 999999 not found"}
VAL-APP-004.details: curl http://localhost:8585/api/facts/999999 returned HTTP 404 with a structured JSON error message. No HTML or 500 error.

VAL-APP-005.evidence: All HTML, CSS, JS served from localhost:8585. No external domain URLs found in any source files. Browser resource entries show only localhost:8585 requests.
VAL-APP-005.details: Grepped HTML for external src/href URLs: none found. Grepped CSS for external url() references: none found. Grepped JS for external fetch/import/src/href URLs: none found. Browser performance.getEntriesByType('resource') confirmed only 2 resources loaded, both from http://localhost:8585/static/.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed. All app infrastructure assertions verified — server runs on port 8585, static files served correctly, health endpoint responds with DB status, API returns structured JSON errors, and no external CDN dependencies exist.
